title: Operating Theatre
editorialSummary: Types of surgery grouped by approach: open surgery (laparotomy, thoracotomy, craniotomy, sternotomy), minimally invasive (laparoscopy, arthroscopy, thoracoscopy, hysteroscopy), reconstructive (skin graft, flap repair, rhinoplasty, palatoplasty), and transplant (renal, liver, heart, cornea). Each surgical type fits one approach family without ambiguity.

meta.gptRationale: Surgical terminology is specialized and lexically dense, making the fine-grained procedure families hard to separate for non-experts.
